candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line, preferred over cash flow presentation lines.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of the period

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of the pe- riod
candidates.why: Beginning balance, not the balance-sheet cash target.

candidates.row_label: Cash acquired in a business combination, net
candidates.why: Not a cash balance item.

candidates.row_label: Effect of exchange rate on cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Cash flow adjustment, not the balance-sheet cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Net (decrease)/increase in cash and cash equiva
candidates.why: Change in cash, not the cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Net (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Change in cash, not the cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Non-cash disposals of property,  plant and equipment and intangible  assets
candidates.why: Not cash and cash equivalents.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet cash line as required.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not preferred when a reported total exists.
Not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Clean current financing debt line on the balance sheet; excludes lease liabilities and is preferred as STD.
Also represents current maturities of debt, but appears duplicative of the clean current debt line based on identical values in shown years.
Cash flow activity, not a balance-sheet debt balance.
Cash flow activity, not a balance-sheet debt balance.

variables.notes: Chose the clean current debt total and excluded lease liabilities. Did not also select 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year' to avoid double counting since the values appear duplicative.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable.
Tax receivable is the opposite of taxes payable.
Cash flow payment line, not a balance-sheet payable.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate was provided, but this exact balance-sheet label is a confident match for TXP.

candidates.why: Direct total/net PPE line on the balance sheet; preferred for PPEGT.

candidates.why: Lease-related asset component, not total PPE.

candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not total PPE.
Not PPE.

candidates.why: Cash flow line, not balance-sheet PPE balance.
